item.title: And now, for something uplifting!
item.description: It just struck me as I’m uploading this, how AMAZING and historic this split screen video is! The first Black Woman Vice President of the United States announcing the nomination confirmation of the first Black Woman Supreme Court Justice!! ..........I’m going to need a minute.....

item.dc:creator: BlindGardener

item.title: Truly a head-scratcher
item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: Standing ovation for this epic mic drop in response to a mansplaining attempt
item.description:
Oh?
Whaaaaaat?
Go on...
Gooooo oooon
PREACH!
You ARE good!
Nice lady who says not to pick on the mansplainer
As a lady working in the Tech industry, I've always had at some points over the years, had to deal with sexist comments. So for me, this response was aamaaazing and I wanted to share it. Tldr: a sexist dude on twitter got a good serving to woopass followed by a mic drop by a lady who does know wtf she's talking about. Edit: Holy moly this went viral and a pizza my heart award. ? Thanks all. I'm glad everyone else appears to agree that this was a great mic drop. I hope this is a good reminder to folks to think twice before you assume things about others.
item.dc:creator: disneyeyes

item.title: Kharkiv was a little scarier than normal yesterday
item.description: Volunteers are driving in Saltivka, Kharkiv, Ukraine. Our sub group - KhHelp, helps Tera Oborona, and the needy by delivering supplies on a daily basis. They accept requests through social media channels, then prioritize them and get to work. Yesterday was rougher than usual for them, please take a look. We are absolutely blessed to be supporting such brave young patriots. -- edit -- You guys are too generous. Thank you for all the kind words and support. There were a few requests for a direct link to our donations page, here it is: https://gogetfunding.com/kharkiv-civilian-relief-efforts If you want to contribute your time and skills, there is also this form you can fill out in order to join our international volunteer group, Katata (Its a discord channel backed by a few other services): https://forms.gle/AguEaKgWFQkoWrsX7 We need translators, software, social media, marketing, legal and Admin.
item.dc:creator: kharkivcivrelief

item.dc:creator: charondaboatman

item.description:
I'm going to stop for a bit.
I know this may seem silly...
But I'm a little hurt by the down votes on the post that criticizes white men...
I mean there's 50 images. Those are...3?
But I've never had a post go negative before.
I'm more sensitive than I thought!
Sorry!

item.title: Why are people like this?
item.description: FP edit: not something I expected to get so much traction, but here we are. Clarification - these were both customers, not co-workers. Be good to each other. Treat everyone with respect, especially the folks in retail and food, please?
item.dc:creator: ladyfirewitch9000

item.title: I can explain!
item.description: Yes, it's a stolen image - and reposted - but that's not the point. I showed this to my wife and she just said "of course, morning people tend to be extroverts and want to be around others, so they want them to wake up and interact. Night people tend to be introverts and are afraid that they will wake someone up and have to talk to them." Makes perfect sense to me. For reference, me on left, her on right.
item.dc:creator: TheUglyGuy

item.title: Soooooo close
